titles.native: サンリオ・アニメ世界名作劇場

Hello Kitty fortellinger

description:
Hello Kitty and other Sanrio characters star in adaptations of various fairy tales from all over the world.

This entry contains:
1. Hello kitty no Shirayukihime / Hello Kitty in "Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs" (ハローキティの白雪姫)
2. Bad Badtz-maru no Ookami ga Kita! / Badtz-Maru in "The Shepherd Boy and the Wolf" (バッドばつ丸のオオカミが来た！)
3. Pochakko no Jack to Mame no ki / Pochacco in "Jack and the Beanstalk" (ポチャッコのジャックと豆の木)
4. Hello Kitty no Susama no Mimi wa Roba no Mimi / Hello Kitty & Mimmy in "The Story of King Midas" (ハローキティの王様の耳はロバの耳)
5. Hello Kitty no Hansel to Gretel / Hello Kitty & Dear Daniel in "Hansel & Gretel" (ハローキティのヘンゼルとグレーテル)
6. My Melody no Akazukin / My Melody in "Little Red Riding Hood" (マイメロディの赤ずきん)
7. Hello Kitty no Kaguya-Hime / Hello Kitty in "The Bamboo Princess" (ハローキティのかぐや姫)
8. Hangyodon no Hadaka no Ousama / Hangyodon in "The Emperor's New Clothes" (ハンギョドンのはだかの王様)
9. Hello Kitty no Nemureru Mori no Bijo / Hello Kitty in "Sleeping Beauty" (ハローキティのねむれる森の美女)
10. Bad Badtz-Maru no Ari to Kirigirisu / Badtz-Maru in "The Ants and the Grasshopper" (バッドばつ丸のアリとキリギリス)
11. Hello Kitty no Hakuchou no Ouji / Hello Kitty in "The Wild Swans" (ハローキティの白鳥の王子)
12. O Saru no Monkichi no Kin no Ono Gin no Ono / Monkichi in "Mercury and the Workmen" (おさるのもんきちの金の斧 銀の斧)
13. Hello Kitty no Kurumiwari Ningyou / Hello Kitty in "The Nutcracker" (ハローキティのくるみ割り人形)
14. Corocorokuririn no Inaka no Nezumi Tokai no Nezumi / Corocorokuririn in "The Country Mouse and the Town Mouse" (コロコロクリリンの田舎のネズミ都会のネズミ)
15. Hello Kitty no Momotarou / Hello Kitty in "Momotaro" (ハローキティの桃太郎)
16. Pompompurin no Usagi to Kame / Pompompurin in "The Tortoise and the Hare" (ポムポムプリンのウサギとカメ)
17. Hello Kitty no Cinderella / Hello Kitty in "Cinderella" (ハローキティのシンデレラ)
18. Ahiru no Pekkle no Ahiru no Drakestail / Pekkle in "Drakestail" (アヒルのペックルのアヒルのドレイクステール)
19. Kero Kero Keroppi no Arajin to Mahou no Ranpu / Keroppi in "Aladdin and the Magic Lamp" (けろけろけろっぴのアラジンと魔法のランプ)
20. Hello Kitty no Match Uri no Shoujo / Hello Kitty in "The Little Match Girl" (ハローキティのマッチ売りの少女)
21. Hello Kitty no Nagagutsu o Haita Neko / Hello Kitty in "Puss in Boots" (ハローキティの長靴をはいた猫)
22. Ahiru no Pekkle no Minikui Ahiru no ko / Pekkle in "The Ugly Duckling" (アヒルのペックルのみにくいアヒルの子)
23. Hello Kitty no o Yayu bi Hime / Hello Kitty in "Thumbelina" (ハローキティのおやゆび姫)
24. Pompompurin no Kitakaze to Taiyou / Pompompurin in "The North Wind and the Sun" (ポムポムプリンの北風と太陽)
25. Hello Kitty no Yuki no Joou / Hello Kitty & Dear Daniel in "The Snow Queen" (ハローキティの雪の女王)
26. Hello Kitty no 3 Hiki no ko Buta / Hello Kitty, Mimmy, & Dear Daniel in "The Three Little Pigs" (ハローキティの3匹の子ぶた)
